flashcards.back: this is an innovative wrench specifically designed to allow quick, easy removal and installation of all steel rise piping on underground storage tanks. It features an adjustable chain vise that quickly mounts to 3 to 4 inches riser pipes and nipples, submersible pump housing, leak detection device on submersible pumps and 4 to 2 inches reduces. It is operable in confined spaces (as small as 14 inches diameter); ideal for use in spill containment reservoirs and manholes

flashcards.front: What is Packing Nut Socket Wrenches?
flashcards.back: These are available in sets and fir nearly all tub, tub and shower valves. They are hexagonal on both ends and hollow core to fit over faucet stem handles. Their importance lie on the fact that faucet valve packing nuts and stem assemblies are brass; If the workman uses an open-ended or adjustable wrench, strong pressure may warp or break the nut thimble. These are practically impossible to replace without tearing out the walls

identification.prompt: What is Wrenches?
accepted_answers: is a tool operated by hand, and is made for tightening or loosening bolts, or anything that needs to be turned. The English call it a “Spanner”

identification.prompt: What is Pipe Wrench?
accepted_answers: A hand tool having one jaw movable and the other relatively fixed, the two parallel jaws are opened or closed when placed on a pipe and rotated in one direction

identification.source_ref: PRACTICAL PROBLEM TERMS.pdf | p.1 | Rjes

identification.prompt: What is Stillson Wrench?
accepted_answers: it is a variation of pipe wrench with a swiveling seriated jaw and knurled control knob located between the frame forming the head and the handle of the wrench. Daniel Stillson
identification.explanation_short: it is a variation of pipe wrench with a swiveling seriated jaw and knurled control knob located between the frame forming the head and the handle of the wrench. Daniel Stillson

identification.prompt: What is End pipe Wrench?
accepted_answers: A tool fast and easy grip used on constricted spaces or close to a wall where pipes alter their course (for example where they bend with a 90-degree angle). They are set at a slight angle to the wrenches’ handles and they have teeth in the jaw for an improved grip

identification.explanation_long: A tool fast and easy grip used on constricted spaces or close to a wall where pipes alter their course (for example where they bend with a 90-degree angle). They are set at a slight angle to the wrenches’ handles and they have teeth in the jaw for an improved grip
identification.source_ref: PRACTICAL PROBLEM TERMS.pdf | p.1 | Rjes

identification.prompt: What is Rap wrench?
accepted_answers: a variation of a pipe wrench; has a deeper and broader hook jaw housing which provides a smooth, flat surface that may be occasionally used as a hammer
identification.explanation_short: a variation of a pipe wrench; has a deeper and broader hook jaw housing which provides a smooth, flat surface that may be occasionally used as a hammer

identification.prompt: What is Compound Leverage Wrench?
accepted_answers: A unique type of pipe wrench in which the turning force applied is multiplied. Ideal for freeing locked couplings and joints frozen by age or damage
identification.explanation_short: A unique type of pipe wrench in which the turning force applied is multiplied. Ideal for freeing locked couplings and joints frozen by age or damage
identification.explanation_long: A unique type of pipe wrench in which the turning force applied is multiplied. Ideal for freeing locked couplings and joints frozen by age or damage

identification.prompt: What is Offset Pipe Wrench?
accepted_answers: A unique type of pipe wrench featuring a jaw opening parallel to the handle and a narrower hook jaw which provides easy entry into tight spaces
identification.explanation_short: A unique type of pipe wrench featuring a jaw opening parallel to the handle and a narrower hook jaw which provides easy entry into tight spaces
identification.explanation_long: A unique type of pipe wrench featuring a jaw opening parallel to the handle and a narrower hook jaw which provides easy entry into tight spaces

identification.prompt: What is Adjustable Spud Wrench?
accepted_answers: It has un-serrated jaws, used to turn fittings of minimum strength, such as copper and brass valve and drain trap fitting or sinks and lavatories
identification.explanation_short: It has un-serrated jaws, used to turn fittings of minimum strength, such as copper and brass valve and drain trap fitting or sinks and lavatories

identification.prompt: What is Adjustable Wrench / Crescent wrench?

identification.prompt: What is Monkey Wrench?
accepted_answers: A tool which resembles a pipe wrench, except for its smooth jaws. It is used to hold or turn hardware having flat surfaces, such as nuts and drain fittings. An open end or adjustable wrench may be substituted for this purpose. Invented by Charles Moncky
identification.explanation_short: A tool which resembles a pipe wrench, except for its smooth jaws. It is used to hold or turn hardware having flat surfaces, such as nuts and drain fittings. An open end or adjustab
identification.explanation_long: A tool which resembles a pipe wrench, except for its smooth jaws. It is used to hold or turn hardware having flat surfaces, such as nuts and drain fittings. An open end or adjustable wrench may be substituted for this purpose. Invented by Charles Moncky
identification.source_ref: PRACTICAL PROBLEM TERMS.pdf | p.2

identification.prompt: What term matches this definition? For tightening taps without isolating the water supply. Adjustable jaws allow for access to both the pipe union nut and the tap back nut with the same spanner. Double-ended design allows use on all standard sink and bath nuts
identification.explanation_long: Jaw Dropper Wrench: For tightening taps without isolating the water supply. Adjustable jaws allow for access to both the pipe union nut and the tap back nut with the same spanner. Double-ended design allows use on all standard sink and bath nuts
identification.source_ref: PRACTICAL PROBLEM TERMS.pdf | p.2

identification.prompt: What is Strap Wrench?
accepted_answers: This is used for any polished pipes particularly plastic or synthetic and this walled or plated which are relatively soft or may be scratched or crushed by a wrench with serrated jaws. It has a long nylon strap which gives a tight grip
identification.explanation_short: This is used for any polished pipes particularly plastic or synthetic and this walled or plated which are relatively soft or may be scratched or crushed by a wrench with serrated j
identification.explanation_long: This is used for any polished pipes particularly plastic or synthetic and this walled or plated which are relatively soft or may be scratched or crushed by a wrench with serrated jaws. It has a long nylon strap which gives a tight grip

identification.prompt: What is UST Wrench?
accepted_answers: this is an innovative wrench specifically designed to allow quick, easy removal and installation of all steel rise piping on underground storage tanks. It features an adjustable chain vise that quickly mounts to 3 to 4 inches riser pipes and nipples, submersible pump housing, leak detection device on submersible pumps and 4 to 2 inches reduces. It is operable in confined spaces (as small as 14 inches diameter); ideal for use in spill containment reservoirs and manholes

identification.prompt: What is Torque Wrench?
accepted_answers: A type of wrench used in No hub soil pipe installation. It is used to ensure tight, leak free joints. The drive tightness with a fast ratchet until the wrench clicks for an accurate 60-pound torque for every application
identification.explanation_short: A type of wrench used in No hub soil pipe installation. It is used to ensure tight, leak free joints. The drive tightness with a fast ratchet until the wrench clicks for an accurat
identification.explanation_long: A type of wrench used in No hub soil pipe installation. It is used to ensure tight, leak free joints. The drive tightness with a fast ratchet until the wrench clicks for an accurate 60-pound torque for every application
identification.source_ref: PRACTICAL PROBLEM TERMS.pdf | p.2

identification.prompt: What term matches this definition? A type of wrench used to install or extract 1 through 2 inches nipples. It is composed of serrated slotted disks of different diameters attached to a shaft, these disks expand by eccentric action and provide tight grip between the interior walls of the pipe and the disk. This is used to hold closet spuds and bath, basin and sink strainers with a diameter up to 2 inches
identification.explanation_long: Internal Wrench —: A type of wrench used to install or extract 1 through 2 inches nipples. It is composed of serrated slotted disks of different diameters attached to a shaft, these disks expand by eccentric action and provide tight grip between the interior walls of the pipe and the disk. This is used to hold closet spuds and bath, basin and sink strainers with a diameter up to 2 inches
identification.source_ref: PRACTICAL PROBLEM TERMS.pdf | p.2

identification.prompt: What term matches this definition? A wrench with a hexagonal jaw which is multi-side, used to provide a secure grip on all hexagonal nuts, square nuts, unions, and valve packing nuts. The extra-wide opening offset is ideal for securing drain nut on sinks and tubs
identification.explanation_long: Hex Wrench —: A wrench with a hexagonal jaw which is multi-side, used to provide a secure grip on all hexagonal nuts, square nuts, unions, and valve packing nuts. The extra-wide opening offset is ideal for securing drain nut on sinks and tubs
identification.source_ref: PRACTICAL PROBLEM TERMS.pdf | p.2

identification.prompt: What is Packing Nut Socket Wrenches?
accepted_answers: These are available in sets and fir nearly all tub, tub and shower valves. They are hexagonal on both ends and hollow core to fit over faucet stem handles. Their importance lie on the fact that faucet valve packing nuts and stem assemblies are brass; If the workman uses an open-ended or adjustable wrench, strong pressure may warp or break the nut thimble. These are practically impossible to replace without tearing out the walls

identification.prompt: What term matches this definition? A tool usually made from carbon steel. Pipe taps are used to create a threading system inside a hollow pipe.
